subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: This parable was revealed on behalf of Peter and Paul, because at first Paul was one of the adversaries of the Revelation... The 'fatted calf' is the Heavenly Table of Knowledge
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @Judas, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @rejection, opposition and persecution
